commands.review_summary:
The branch adds a command cron payload type across protocol, store, CLI, gateway execution, UI display/preservation, and docs while rejecting command payload creation/editing from the agent cron tool.

PR surface: Source +885, Tests +485, Docs +62. Total +1432 across 36 files.

Reproducibility: not applicable. This PR adds a new command cron capability rather than fixing a reproduced bug. Source inspection confirms current main has only systemEvent and agentTurn cron payloads.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] Human maintainer review is needed because this draft has a protected maintainer label, introduces security-sensitive command execution, and lacks real behavior proof.
